_doc: P1-T5 personal-notability gold set. Engagement-worthy if ANY signal is true (owned/used · decided chose-or-rejected · recurring across >=2 conversations · substantive opinion/conclusion); else DROP as trivia. Reused by P5-T4 ROUTE and P9. Every owned/decided item MUST be KEPT.

notable.name: Panasonic Lumix S5IIX
notable.reason: Owned full-frame mirrorless body, acquired 2024-12, used daily as a video-conference and anamorphic camera.

notable.name: L-Mount
notable.reason: The lens mount Josh standardized on; recurs across camera and lens conversations as the navigation hub for adaptation.

notable.name: Sigma 150-600
notable.reason: Chosen as the sane long-reach telephoto pick at ~$600 over pricier alternatives; a recorded conclusion.

notable.name: Sankor 16C
notable.reason: Owned anamorphic adapter used on the S5IIX for de-squeeze experiments.

notable.name: Lumix 75-300
notable.reason: Owned telephoto zoom used for reach before the Sigma decision.

notable.name: PETG
notable.reason: Material Josh prints with regularly; recurring print-settings discussions and a settled opinion on its tradeoffs vs PLA.

notable.name: M42 mount
notable.reason: One of the legacy mounts Josh deliberately adapts from onto L-Mount; recurs in the adaptation discussions.

notable.name: EF mount
notable.reason: The other mount Josh adapts from; a recorded decision about which adapters to buy.

notable.name: Toyota Production System
notable.reason: A domain Josh returns to across conversations and holds substantive opinions about (jidoka, kanban) as a thinking lens.

notable.name: MLX
notable.reason: The framework mlx-bun is built on; recurs constantly and Josh holds strong opinions about its kernels and lazy eval.

trivia.name: npm
